summary: Gallery P1 Immersive Viewer Testing - ALL PASSED. Backend: 17/17 tests passed (feed, user-feed, view endpoints + P0 regression). Frontend: All P1 features verified - Immersive TikTok-style viewer, hover zoom preview, user sections (Your Creations, Continue Watching, For You), mobile responsive.
critical_code_review_comments: gallery_routes.py: /feed endpoint returns ordered items with seed_index for immersive viewing - WORKING
gallery_routes.py: /feed?seed_item_id=X positions feed starting from that item - WORKING
gallery_routes.py: /user-feed returns your_creations, continue_watching, for_you sections - WORKING
gallery_routes.py: POST /view tracks viewed items for Continue Watching - WORKING
Gallery.js: ImmersiveViewer component with vertical 9:16 format - WORKING
Gallery.js: Immersive viewer has position indicator (e.g., 3/20) in top-right - WORKING
Gallery.js: Right-side action buttons (Heart, Remix pink, Share, Mute/Unmute) - WORKING
Gallery.js: Bottom CTAs (Remix This + Create Similar) - WORKING
Gallery.js: Close button (data-testid=immersive-close) returns to gallery - WORKING
Gallery.js: Keyboard navigation (↑↓ for next/prev, m for mute, esc to close) - IMPLEMENTED
Gallery.js: Touch swipe support (swipe up/down > 60px) - IMPLEMENTED
Gallery.js: Video preloading for adjacent items - IMPLEMENTED
Gallery.js: GalleryCard hover zoom effect (transition-transform duration-700 scale-110) - WORKING
Gallery.js: User sections (Your Creations, Continue Watching, For You) for logged-in users - WORKING
Gallery.js: Continue Watching appears after viewing items in immersive mode - WORKING

test_credentials.test_user: test@visionary-suite.com / Test@2026# (for user feed, continue watching, remix)

seed_data_creation: Gallery seeded with 21+ demo items via seed_gallery_if_empty() on backend startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Gallery P1 Immersive Viewer fully tested in iteration 399. Key findings: 1) Backend APIs working: /api/gallery/feed (returns items with seed_index), /api/gallery/feed?seed_item_id=X (positions feed), /api/gallery/user-feed (personalized sections), POST /api/gallery/view (tracks views); 2) Immersive viewer opens from hero Watch button, gallery cards, and explore cards; 3) Immersive viewer has vertical 9:16 format, position indicator, right-side action buttons (Heart, Remix pink, Share, Mute), bottom CTAs (Remix This, Create Similar); 4) Navigation works via buttons, keyboard (↑↓, m, esc), and touch swipe; 5) Hover zoom effect on cards (scale-110 on hover with transition-transform duration-700); 6) User sections appear for logged-in users: Your Creations (user's pipeline jobs), Continue Watching (recently viewed), For You (personalized recommendations); 7) Continue Watching updates after viewing items in immersive mode; 8) Mobile responsive (390x844) - full-screen immersive viewer works correctly; 9) P0 regression passed - featured, rails, explore, categories all working.

backend_feed_api.details: GET /api/gallery/feed returns items with seed_index for immersive viewing

backend_feed_seed_item.details: GET /api/gallery/feed?seed_item_id=X positions feed starting from that item

backend_user_feed_api.details: GET /api/gallery/user-feed returns your_creations, continue_watching, for_you sections

backend_view_api.details: POST /api/gallery/view tracks viewed items for Continue Watching

frontend_immersive_viewer_opens.details: Immersive viewer opens from hero Watch button, gallery cards, and explore cards

frontend_immersive_vertical_format.details: Immersive viewer shows vertical 9:16 format with thumbnail/video

frontend_immersive_action_buttons.details: Right-side action buttons: Heart, Remix (pink), Share, Mute/Unmute

frontend_immersive_bottom_ctas.details: Bottom CTAs: Remix This + Create Similar

frontend_immersive_mobile.details: Immersive viewer works on mobile viewport 390x844 with full-screen layout

frontend_hover_zoom.details: Cards show subtle zoom animation on hover (transition-transform duration-700 scale-110)

frontend_your_creations_rail.details: Logged-in user sees Your Creations rail (data-testid=rail-your-creations)

frontend_for_you_rail.details: Logged-in user sees Recommended For You rail (data-testid=rail-for-you)

frontend_continue_watching_rail.details: Continue Watching rail (data-testid=rail-continue-watching) appears after viewing items

p0_regression_explore.details: Explore grid with search, filters, sort still works

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real implementations. Gallery seed data provides demo content with pre-set metrics.
